title: companyCompensation
description: List of executives and their compensation details for the specified company identifier.

personId.description: Factset Entity Identifier for the Person

salary.description: Salary of the person. Expressed in USD and raw units.

bonus.description: Bonus of the executive during the fiscal year. Expressed in USD and raw units.

stockAwards.description: Stock awards for the person. Expressed in USD and raw units.

optionsAwards.description: Option Awards for the person. Expressed in USD and raw units.

otherCompensation.description: All the other compensations which are not explicitly defined as salary, bonus, stock awards, or options awards. Expressed in USD and raw units.

totalCompensation.description: The sum of all compensation for the requested person as reported by the company. Expressed in USD and raw units.

nonEquityIncentivePlanComp.description: All the earnings pursuant to awards under non-equity incentive plans. Expressed in USD and raw units.

nonQualifiedCompEarnings.description: All the other nonqualified defined contribution which are not tax qualified and other contributions. Expressed in USD and raw units.

compensationYear.description: The most recent year of compensation is expressed as 'YYYY' as opposed to 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

requestId.description: Original identifier used for the request.
